prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mastery card icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for six mastery icons.
Subject: six ornate mastery emblems in a 3x2 sheet: fire mastery flame sigil, ice mastery crystal sigil, earth mastery leaf/stone sigil, heart mastery healing sigil, armor mastery shield sigil, gold mastery coin/crown sigil.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game icons, premium collectible feel, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 3x2 sheet, equal-size emblems centered with padding.
Color palette: elemental colors plus antique gold and steel accents.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is the actual icon component; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any icon artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
